I'm a business consultant and analyst who works at the intersection of risk, data, and strategy. MBA in Marketing with a minor in Business Analytics — I've audited 300+ outlets, cleaned 30,000+ records, and built compliance frameworks from the ground up.

From identifying control gaps to delivering structured insights to stakeholders, I turn messy data into clean decisions.

03

EXPERIENCE

ERAYAA BUILDERS
Mar 2026 — Present
Bengaluru, India
Business Development Associate
Audited and cleaned 100+ daily leads, removing ~40 duplicate and incomplete records — reducing data noise by 40% and contributing to the team's first closed sale after a 3-month dry run
Replaced a manual paper-based lead distribution system with an Excel tracking dashboard capturing 30,000+ customer records including location preferences and feedback
Performed process risk assessments to detect workflow inefficiencies and recommend corrective controls, enhancing operational compliance and reporting reliability
Proposed an API-based data standardisation solution to reduce reporting inconsistencies and strengthen control over customer data management
BERGER PAINTS
May — Jul 2025
Kolkata, India
Management Intern — Sales & Operations
Conducted a compliance verification exercise across 1,000+ secondary stakeholders (painters) in 3 days, confirming quarter-end points collection using AI-assisted calling
Identified a process control gap in product information delivery caused by language barriers; proposed and demonstrated a QR-based solution to standardise access
Collected, maintained, and reconciled financial records including cheque submissions — ensuring data accuracy and accountability across the reporting cycle
Participated in weekly, monthly, and quarterly business review meetings, gaining structured exposure to performance monitoring cycles and stakeholder reporting
ITC LIMITED
May — Jul 2024
Kolkata, India
Management Intern — Market Strategy & Analytics
Conducted a field audit across 300+ outlets in two districts, classifying and disqualifying ~150 for compliance reasons — non-smoking zones, government restrictions, no building permission, or active competitor agreements
Negotiated with competitor-tied outlets lacking formal agreements, building a pipeline that resulted in 90+ new customer onboardings after the internship concluded
Executed 10–20 Legal Term Agreements (LTAs) with new HORECA sector customers, ensuring contractual compliance and formalising business relationships
Tracked and reconciled product movement records at distributor level, maintaining data accuracy across inventory and sales reporting cycles
